title: KLA Corporation (KLAC)Intrinsic Value
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on KLAC using FY2025 actuals. One number. Every assumption disclosed. Here's what KLA Corporation is really worth.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y5)
fcfGrowth.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-76jzq75q>
Revenue grew nearly 24% in FY2025, recovering strongly from a dip in FY2024 (-6.5%). As fabrication plants continue adopting more advanced nodes (EUV), metrology and inspection needs surge. We use 12% to smooth out potential semi-cycle dips while acknowledging KLA's critical position in advanced node yields.
